ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the county belongs to */,
  "election_administrator" TEXT /* Election administrator for the county */,
  "election_website" TEXT /* Election website for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, gubernatorial, local) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Short description of the election */,
  "election_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the result belongs to */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the county */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Total absentee votes cast in the county */,
  "reporting" INTEGER /* Reporting status of the county (e.g., 0-100%) */,
  "precincts" INTEGER /* Number of precincts in the county */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Short description of the election result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the election result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Short description of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* Website of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_results" (
  "candidate_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result the candidate result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the candidate in the county */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate in the county */,
  "candidate_result_description" TEXT /* Short description of the candidate result */,
  "candidate_result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the candidate result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_methods" (
  "absentee_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee method */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the method belongs to */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for absentee voting (e.g., mail-in, in-person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the absentee method */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for using the absentee method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_methods_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eevp_values" (
  "eevp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EEVP value */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the EEVP value belongs to */,
  "eevp_value" REAL /* EEVP value for the county */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the EEVP value (e.g., Edison Research) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the EEVP value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eevp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eevp_values_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnout_stages" (
  "turnout_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout stage */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the turnout stage belongs to */,
  "stage" INTEGER /* Turnout stage for the county (e.g., 0-100%) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the turnout stage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the turnout stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnout_stages_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_counts" (
  "absentee_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee count */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the absentee count belongs to */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Absentee count for the county */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of absentee counting for the county (e.g., 'unknown', 'none') */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the absentee count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_counts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absentee_outstandings" (
  "absentee_outstanding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absentee outstanding */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the absentee outstanding belongs to */,
  "outstanding" INTEGER /* Absentee outstanding for the county */,
  "max_ballots" INTEGER /* Maximum ballots for the county */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the absentee outstanding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absentee_outstanding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absentee_outstandings_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provisional_outstandings" (
  "provisional_outstanding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provisional outstanding */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the provisional outstanding belongs to */,
  "outstanding" INTEGER /* Provisional outstanding for the county */,
  "count_progress" TEXT /* Progress of provisional counting for the county (e.g., 'unknown', 'none') */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the provisional outstanding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provisional_outstanding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provisional_outstandings_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leader_margins" (
  "leader_margin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leader margin */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the leader margin belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the leader margin belongs to */,
  "margin_value" REAL /* Leader margin value for the county */,
  "margin_display" TEXT /* Leader margin display for the county (e.g., 'R+39', 'D+14') */,
  "leader_margin_description" TEXT /* Short description of the leader margin */,
  "leader_margin_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the leader margin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leader_margin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leader_margins_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leader_margins_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_elections" (
  "historical_election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the historical election belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical election */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin of the historical election */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Votes cast in the historical election */,
  "historical_election_description" TEXT /* Short description of the historical election */,
  "historical_election_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the historical election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_elections_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "election_official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the election official belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official (e.g., Director of Elections) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_administration" (
  "election_administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election administration */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the election administration belongs to */,
  "voting_system" TEXT /* Voting system used in the county */,
  "polling_places" INTEGER /* Number of polling places in the county */,
  "early_voting_sites" INTEGER /* Number of early voting sites in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_administration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
